heading: Flood risk in The Hatch — What Property Owners Need to Know

faq.question: How can I check flood risk risk for a specific property in The Hatch?

faq.answer: Insurance premiums in The Hatch can be influenced by flood risk risk. Higher-risk properties may face higher premiums or excesses. A full climate report includes insurance cost projections.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 5.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
